scheme_name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
exit_load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year.
description: The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation/income by investing predominantly in Mid-Cap companies.

fund_managers.education: Mr. Setalvad is a B. Sc and MBA from University of North Carolina.
fund_managers.experience: Prior to joining HDFC AMC he has worked with New Vernon Advisory Services Ltd., HDFC AMC and ING Barings N.V.
